TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: makaala sadep han . anu mahedaw paydang han u makaalaay tu nu-pay-l a kawlah tabakiay ,a saydan "lasubu nu aniwyu"sakamu sa: "nikabalakiyan caay kawni kaydihan , wiyda sa Sanu udip han , sadikuday tu nikaudip , malasalining kisu nu udip ." ."kabalakuyan tu ...mala salining nu udip , udip ku musikulay tu udip , udip ku musakapahay tu udip tu . .nikabalakiyan tu cimahenaca ku maydihay . .u acawa balaki tu anucaay sa miliyas tu , ŤÄĀšľīŚ∑≤ŤÄĀśąĖŚ∑≤ŤĶįšļÜ.u wawa hananay mihica caay kaydih tu babalaki nu udip ,ŚÖíŚ•≥Áē∂ÁĄ∂śĄõšĽĖÁöĄÁą∂śĮć. nika siluma tu ku heni šĹÜšĽĖŚÄĎśúČŚģ∂Śļ≠.siwaea śúČŚ≠źŚ•≥.u kawaw ku sakaudip nu heni .tatenga mangelu' kuheni anu hamin han ku kaydih I tisuwan , midama tisuwan . .kyu...amana pilunguc "sakaydihan "Śõ†ś≠§..šłćŤÉĹŤ¶ĀśĪā"ŤĘęśĄõ".minanam maydih "tu udip".ŤÄĆŤ¶ĀŚ≠łśúÉ"Ťá™śĄõ"..misanga tu salining nu udip .misakapah tu udip.Ťá™Ś∑ĪšŅĚŤ≠∑Ś•ĹŤá™Ś∑Ī. sikulen ku udipšŅĚŤ≠∑Ś•ĹŤá™Ś∑Ī.sakagenulan musikul ku udip . .nikabalaki tu ...u ekeng nu udip kanca siinelangay , .anu pihaceng ku imelang sa katalaising.śúČŚ§ßÁóÖŚéĽśĪāťÜę.anu nu babalaki hina adihay a imelang sa .sataneng ha " adidi'enŚįĪťĀ©Áē∂ÁöĄ"ťąćśĄü"šłÄšļõ.amana ka anub , sadep hank u balucu' . "makaala sadep han . anu mahedaw paydang han ". amana kayadah ku nisimsim tu mabaatay ..anu yadah i balucu' haw muhalhal . mikilim tu tanengay kakaydihan nu udip a kawaw . namakayni minanam atu udip masasukapah . . tatengaay a kawa pasubana' i titaan . " u nikaudi u mahidaay u aniwiwyay a nipiliwku . katukuh sadikuday camaw kaw cacayay .inayay ku tatengaay a miedap tisuwan". ". " anu mahida idaw ku sapihalhal, metalaw a balaki.. mahida sa minanam tataytay, masasudiku tu balaki"..pakaybalucu'en mudawiys tu sadikuday a nikaudip, u kasaetiman a tuki imahini ." . sakapahen musikul ku udip nu udip , sumaden t uku balucu' , u mahiniay sa misakapah tu udip , u adingu isu kya masubelid a mududuc pacabay tisuwan . .sisa, balaki tu kita , kahina pacekil tu udip : pisinanuti a muculil : anu mahetik ku pusak : muluung a misapud : tayda itatayan a mana pisaicelang : anu sukucu amana lung :minanum sa , yu mukan mangaleb haymaw han , muniyul tu tatelecan, muniyul tu tangah, patapabaw tu batac nu kuku haymawen ‚Ä¶. u cancanan , saicelang han muhaymaw kaw udip t uku musaungayay . Áē∂ÁĄ∂, . mahida u kamu ni ma-kuy-se " aniwyiw tu lasubu" a sulit sakamu sa "teban nu labi mapacekil sa minanum , u dip tu mumulekalay a minanum ; anu icuwa mangaleb ku adada sa , makakapet tu sapaiyu nu udip; napadeng satu telay madateng henay ku kamu nu wawa hicasa musakamu ‚Ä¶.." kapah tuway . . u dedemiad miseleb kita tu demiad , sadayumen hank u nikaudip , satanengen ku kamu u balucu' , amana piangic mana picalilaw , anu caay sakamu sa tawa han . ." uaniwyiw, anu imelang tu misulit tu cayay kawkakasikadan a cuda , pinanami tu aniwyiw milikay , sadimelen ku udip nu udip atu tahinaay a nisuped a kalisiw , u mahiniay kya u tatengaay nu babalaki u sinidikecan a "badahung"‚Ä¶ "ŤąáŚ≠§Áć®, "ŚĪčÁį∑"‚Ä¶u makaalaay tu nu-pay-l a kawlah tabakiay ,a saydan "lasubu nu aniwyu"sakamu sa: "nikabalakiyan caay kawni kaydihan , wiyda sa Sanu udip han , sadikuday tu nikaudip , malasalining kisu nu udip ." ."kabalakuyan tu ...mala salining nu udip , udip ku musikulay tu udip , udip ku musakapahay tu udip tu . .nikabalakiyan tu cimahenaca ku maydihay . .u acawa balaki tu anucaay sa miliyas tu , ŤÄĀšľīŚ∑≤ŤÄĀśąĖŚ∑≤ŤĶįšļÜ.u wawa hananay mihica caay kaydih tu babalaki nu udip ,ŚÖíŚ•≥Áē∂ÁĄ∂śĄõšĽĖÁöĄÁą∂śĮć. nika siluma tu ku heni šĹÜšĽĖŚÄĎśúČŚģ∂Śļ≠.siwaeaśúČŚ≠źŚ•≥. u kawaw ku sakaudip nu heni .tatenga mangelu' kuheni anu hamin han ku kaydih I tisuwan , midama tisuwan . .kyu...amana pilunguc "sakaydihan "Śõ†ś≠§..šłćŤÉĹŤ¶ĀśĪā"ŤĘęśĄõ".minanam maydih "tu udip".ŤÄĆŤ¶ĀŚ≠łśúÉ"Ťá™śĄõ"..misanga tu salining nu udip .misakapah tu udip.Ťá™Ś∑ĪšŅĚŤ≠∑Ś•ĹŤá™Ś∑Ī. sikulen ku udipšŅĚŤ≠∑Ś•ĹŤá™Ś∑Ī.sakagenulan musikul ku udip . .nikabalaki tu ...u ekeng nu udip kanca siinelangay , .anu pihaceng ku imelang sa katalaising.śúČŚ§ßÁóÖŚéĽśĪāťÜę.anu nu babalaki hina adihay a imelang sa .
S.PHON: makaar~…ĺa sad…ôp ńßan . anu mańß…ôdaw pajdaŇč ńßan u makaar~…ĺaaj tu nu-paj-r~…ĺ a kawr~…ĺańß tabakiaj ,a sajdan "r~…ĺasubu nu aniwju"sakamu sa: "nikabar~…ĺakijan ¶aaj kawni kajdińßan , wijda sa sanu udip ńßan , sadikudaj tu nikaudip , mar~…ĺasar~…ĺiniŇč kisu nu udip ." ."kabar~…ĺakujan tu ...mar~…ĺa sar~…ĺiniŇč nu udip , udip ku musikur~…ĺaj tu udip , udip ku musakapańßaj tu udip tu . .nikabar~…ĺakijan tu ¶imańß…ôna ¶a ku majdińßaj . .u a ¶awa bar~…ĺaki tu anu ¶aaj sa mir~…ĺijas tu , ********.u wawa ńßananaj mińßi ¶a ¶aaj kajdińß tu babar~…ĺaki nu udip ,*********. nika sir~…ĺuma tu ku ńß…ôni ******.siwa…ôa ***.u kawaw ku sakaudip nu ńß…ôni .tat…ôŇča maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° kuńß…ôni anu ńßamin ńßan ku kajdińß i tisuwan , midama tisuwan . .kju...amana pir~…ĺuŇču ¶ "sakajdińßan "**..****"**".minanam majdińß "tu udip".****"**"..misaŇča tu sar~…ĺiniŇč nu udip .misakapańß tu udip.*******. sikur~…ĺ…ôn ku udip*****.sakag…ônur~…ĺan musikur~…ĺ ku udip . .nikabar~…ĺaki tu ...u …ôk…ôŇč nu udip kan ¶a siin…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj , .anu pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa katar~…ĺaisiŇč.******.anu nu babar~…ĺaki ńßina adińßaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa .satan…ôŇč ńßa " adidi Ē~ °…ôn****"**"**.amana ka anub , sad…ôp ńßank u bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° . "makaar~…ĺa sad…ôp ńßan . anu mańß…ôdaw pajdaŇč ńßan ". amana kajadańß ku nisimsim tu mabaataj ..anu jadańß i bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ńßaw muńßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ . mikir~…ĺim tu tan…ôŇčaj kakajdińßan nu udip a kawaw . namakajni minanam atu udip masasukapańß . . tat…ôŇčaaj a kawa pasubana Ē~ ° i titaan . " u nikaudi u mańßidaaj u aniwiwjaj a nipir~…ĺiwku . katukuńß sadikudaj ¶amaw kaw ¶a ¶ajaj .inajaj ku tat…ôŇčaaj a mi…ôdap tisuwan". ". " anu mańßida idaw ku sapińßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ, m…ôtar~…ĺaw a bar~…ĺaki.. mańßida sa minanam tatajtaj, masasudiku tu bar~…ĺaki"..pakajbar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °…ôn mudawijs tu sadikudaj a nikaudip, u kasa…ôtiman a tuki imańßini ." . sakapańß…ôn musikur~…ĺ ku udip nu udip , sumad…ôn t uku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° , u mańßiniaj sa misakapańß tu udip , u adiŇču isu kja masub…ôr~…ĺid a mududu ¶ pa ¶abaj tisuwan . .sisa, bar~…ĺaki tu kita , kańßina pa ¶…ôkir~…ĺ tu udip : pisinanuti a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ : anu mańß…ôtik ku pusak : mur~…ĺuuŇč a misapud : tajda itatajan a mana pisai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč : anu suku ¶u amana r~…ĺuŇč :minanum sa , ju mukan maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ńßajmaw ńßan , munijur~…ĺ tu tat…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶an, munijur~…ĺ tu taŇčańß, patapabaw tu bata ¶ nu kuku ńßajmaw…ôn *. u ¶an ¶anan , sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßan muńßajmaw kaw udip t uku musauŇčajaj . **, . mańßida u kamu ni ma-kuj-s…ô " aniwjiw tu r~…ĺasubu" a sur~…ĺit sakamu sa "t…ôban nu r~…ĺabi mapa ¶…ôkir~…ĺ sa minanum , u dip tu mumur~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺaj a minanum ; anu i ¶uwa maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku adada sa , makakap…ôt tu sapaiju nu udip; napad…ôŇč satu t…ôr~…ĺaj madat…ôŇč ńß…ônaj ku kamu nu wawa ńßi ¶asa musakamu *.." kapańß tuwaj . . u d…ôd…ômiad mis…ôr~…ĺ…ôb kita tu d…ômiad , sadajum…ôn ńßank u nikaudip , satan…ôŇč…ôn ku kamu u bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° , amana piaŇči ¶ mana pi ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw , anu ¶aaj sakamu sa tawa ńßan . ." uaniwjiw, anu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu misur~…ĺit tu ¶ajaj kawkakasikadan a ¶uda , pinanami tu aniwjiw mir~…ĺikaj , sadim…ôr~…ĺ…ôn ku udip nu udip atu tańßinaaj a nisup…ôd a kar~…ĺisiw , u mańßiniaj kja u tat…ôŇčaaj nu babar~…ĺaki u sinidik…ô ¶an a "badańßuŇč"* "***, "**"*u makaar~…ĺaaj tu nu-paj-r~…ĺ a kawr~…ĺańß tabakiaj ,a sajdan "r~…ĺasubu nu aniwju"sakamu sa: "nikabar~…ĺakijan ¶aaj kawni kajdińßan , wijda sa sanu udip ńßan , sadikudaj tu nikaudip , mar~…ĺasar~…ĺiniŇč kisu nu udip ." ."kabar~…ĺakujan tu ...mar~…ĺa sar~…ĺiniŇč nu udip , udip ku musikur~…ĺaj tu udip , udip ku musakapańßaj tu udip tu . .nikabar~…ĺakijan tu ¶imańß…ôna ¶a ku majdińßaj . .u a ¶awa bar~…ĺaki tu anu ¶aaj sa mir~…ĺijas tu , ********.u wawa ńßananaj mińßi ¶a ¶aaj kajdińß tu babar~…ĺaki nu udip ,*********. nika sir~…ĺuma tu ku ńß…ôni ******.siwa…ôa***. u kawaw ku sakaudip nu ńß…ôni .tat…ôŇča maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° kuńß…ôni anu ńßamin ńßan ku kajdińß i tisuwan , midama tisuwan . .kju...amana pir~…ĺuŇču ¶ "sakajdińßan "**..****"**".minanam majdińß "tu udip".****"**"..misaŇča tu sar~…ĺiniŇč nu udip .misakapańß tu udip.*******. sikur~…ĺ…ôn ku udip*****.sakag…ônur~…ĺan musikur~…ĺ ku udip . .nikabar~…ĺaki tu ...u …ôk…ôŇč nu udip kan ¶a siin…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj , .anu pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa katar~…ĺaisiŇč.******.anu nu babar~…ĺaki ńßina adińßaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa .
S.FORM: makaala sadep han . anu mahedaw paydang han u makaalaay tu nu-pay-l a kawlah tabakiay ,a saydan "lasubu nu aniwyu"sakamu sa: "nikabalakiyan caay kawni kaydihan , wiyda sa Sanu udip han , sadikuday tu nikaudip , malasalining kisu nu udip ." ."kabalakuyan tu ...mala salining nu udip , udip ku musikulay tu udip , udip ku musakapahay tu udip tu . .nikabalakiyan tu cimahenaca ku maydihay . .u acawa balaki tu anucaay sa miliyas tu , ŤÄĀšľīŚ∑≤ŤÄĀśąĖŚ∑≤ŤĶįšļÜ.u wawa hananay mihica caay kaydih tu babalaki nu udip ,ŚÖíŚ•≥Áē∂ÁĄ∂śĄõšĽĖÁöĄÁą∂śĮć. nika siluma tu ku heni šĹÜšĽĖŚÄĎśúČŚģ∂Śļ≠.siwaea śúČŚ≠źŚ•≥.u kawaw ku sakaudip nu heni .tatenga mangelu' kuheni anu hamin han ku kaydih I tisuwan , midama tisuwan . .kyu...amana pilunguc "sakaydihan "Śõ†ś≠§..šłćŤÉĹŤ¶ĀśĪā"ŤĘęśĄõ".minanam maydih "tu udip".ŤÄĆŤ¶ĀŚ≠łśúÉ"Ťá™śĄõ"..misanga tu salining nu udip .misakapah tu udip.Ťá™Ś∑ĪšŅĚŤ≠∑Ś•ĹŤá™Ś∑Ī. sikulen ku udipšŅĚŤ≠∑Ś•ĹŤá™Ś∑Ī.sakagenulan musikul ku udip . .nikabalaki tu ...u ekeng nu udip kanca siinelangay , .anu pihaceng ku imelang sa katalaising.śúČŚ§ßÁóÖŚéĽśĪāťÜę.anu nu babalaki hina adihay a imelang sa .sataneng ha " adidi'enŚįĪťĀ©Áē∂ÁöĄ"ťąćśĄü"šłÄšļõ.amana ka anub , sadep hank u balucu' . "makaala sadep han . anu mahedaw paydang han ". amana kayadah ku nisimsim tu mabaatay ..anu yadah i balucu' haw muhalhal . mikilim tu tanengay kakaydihan nu udip a kawaw . namakayni minanam atu udip masasukapah . . tatengaay a kawa pasubana' i titaan . " u nikaudi u mahidaay u aniwiwyay a nipiliwku . katukuh sadikuday camaw kaw cacayay .inayay ku tatengaay a miedap tisuwan". ". " anu mahida idaw ku sapihalhal, metalaw a balaki.. mahida sa minanam tataytay, masasudiku tu balaki"..pakaybalucu'en mudawiys tu sadikuday a nikaudip, u kasaetiman a tuki imahini ." . sakapahen musikul ku udip nu udip , sumaden t uku balucu' , u mahiniay sa misakapah tu udip , u adingu isu kya masubelid a mududuc pacabay tisuwan . .sisa, balaki tu kita , kahina pacekil tu udip : pisinanuti a muculil : anu mahetik ku pusak : muluung a misapud : tayda itatayan a mana pisaicelang : anu sukucu amana lung :minanum sa , yu mukan mangaleb haymaw han , muniyul tu tatelecan, muniyul tu tangah, patapabaw tu batac nu kuku haymawen ‚Ä¶. u cancanan , saicelang han muhaymaw kaw udip t uku musaungayay . Áē∂ÁĄ∂, . mahida u kamu ni ma-kuy-se " aniwyiw tu lasubu" a sulit sakamu sa "teban nu labi mapacekil sa minanum , u dip tu mumulekalay a minanum ; anu icuwa mangaleb ku adada sa , makakapet tu sapaiyu nu udip; napadeng satu telay madateng henay ku kamu nu wawa hicasa musakamu ‚Ä¶.." kapah tuway . . u dedemiad miseleb kita tu demiad , sadayumen hank u nikaudip , satanengen ku kamu u balucu' , amana piangic mana picalilaw , anu caay sakamu sa tawa han . ." uaniwyiw, anu imelang tu misulit tu cayay kawkakasikadan a cuda , pinanami tu aniwyiw milikay , sadimelen ku udip nu udip atu tahinaay a nisuped a kalisiw , u mahiniay kya u tatengaay nu babalaki u sinidikecan a "badahung"‚Ä¶ "ŤąáŚ≠§Áć®, "ŚĪčÁį∑"‚Ä¶u makaalaay tu nu-pay-l a kawlah tabakiay ,a saydan "lasubu nu aniwyu"sakamu sa: "nikabalakiyan caay kawni kaydihan , wiyda sa Sanu udip han , sadikuday tu nikaudip , malasalining kisu nu udip ." ."kabalakuyan tu ...mala salining nu udip , udip ku musikulay tu udip , udip ku musakapahay tu udip tu . .nikabalakiyan tu cimahenaca ku maydihay . .u acawa balaki tu anucaay sa miliyas tu , ŤÄĀšľīŚ∑≤ŤÄĀśąĖŚ∑≤ŤĶįšļÜ.u wawa hananay mihica caay kaydih tu babalaki nu udip ,ŚÖíŚ•≥Áē∂ÁĄ∂śĄõšĽĖÁöĄÁą∂śĮć. nika siluma tu ku heni šĹÜšĽĖŚÄĎśúČŚģ∂Śļ≠.siwaeaśúČŚ≠źŚ•≥. u kawaw ku sakaudip nu heni .tatenga mangelu' kuheni anu hamin han ku kaydih I tisuwan , midama tisuwan . .kyu...amana pilunguc "sakaydihan "Śõ†ś≠§..šłćŤÉĹŤ¶ĀśĪā"ŤĘęśĄõ".minanam maydih "tu udip".ŤÄĆŤ¶ĀŚ≠łśúÉ"Ťá™śĄõ"..misanga tu salining nu udip .misakapah tu udip.Ťá™Ś∑ĪšŅĚŤ≠∑Ś•ĹŤá™Ś∑Ī. sikulen ku udipšŅĚŤ≠∑Ś•ĹŤá™Ś∑Ī.sakagenulan musikul ku udip . .nikabalaki tu ...u ekeng nu udip kanca siinelangay , .anu pihaceng ku imelang sa katalaising.śúČŚ§ßÁóÖŚéĽśĪāťÜę.anu nu babalaki hina adihay a imelang sa .
S.PHON: makaar~…ĺa sad…ôp ńßan . anu mańß…ôdaw pajdaŇč ńßan u makaar~…ĺaaj tu nu-paj-r~…ĺ a kawr~…ĺańß tabakiaj ,a sajdan "r~…ĺasubu nu aniwju"sakamu sa: "nikabar~…ĺakijan ¶aaj kawni kajdińßan , wijda sa sanu udip ńßan , sadikudaj tu nikaudip , mar~…ĺasar~…ĺiniŇč kisu nu udip ." ."kabar~…ĺakujan tu ...mar~…ĺa sar~…ĺiniŇč nu udip , udip ku musikur~…ĺaj tu udip , udip ku musakapańßaj tu udip tu . .nikabar~…ĺakijan tu ¶imańß…ôna ¶a ku majdińßaj . .u a ¶awa bar~…ĺaki tu anu ¶aaj sa mir~…ĺijas tu , ********.u wawa ńßananaj mińßi ¶a ¶aaj kajdińß tu babar~…ĺaki nu udip ,*********. nika sir~…ĺuma tu ku ńß…ôni ******.siwa…ôa ***.u kawaw ku sakaudip nu ńß…ôni .tat…ôŇča maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° kuńß…ôni anu ńßamin ńßan ku kajdińß i tisuwan , midama tisuwan . .kju...amana pir~…ĺuŇču ¶ "sakajdińßan "**..****"**".minanam majdińß "tu udip".****"**"..misaŇča tu sar~…ĺiniŇč nu udip .misakapańß tu udip.*******. sikur~…ĺ…ôn ku udip*****.sakag…ônur~…ĺan musikur~…ĺ ku udip . .nikabar~…ĺaki tu ...u …ôk…ôŇč nu udip kan ¶a siin…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj , .anu pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa katar~…ĺaisiŇč.******.anu nu babar~…ĺaki ńßina adińßaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa .satan…ôŇč ńßa " adidi Ē~ °…ôn****"**"**.amana ka anub , sad…ôp ńßank u bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° . "makaar~…ĺa sad…ôp ńßan . anu mańß…ôdaw pajdaŇč ńßan ". amana kajadańß ku nisimsim tu mabaataj ..anu jadańß i bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ńßaw muńßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ . mikir~…ĺim tu tan…ôŇčaj kakajdińßan nu udip a kawaw . namakajni minanam atu udip masasukapańß . . tat…ôŇčaaj a kawa pasubana Ē~ ° i titaan . " u nikaudi u mańßidaaj u aniwiwjaj a nipir~…ĺiwku . katukuńß sadikudaj ¶amaw kaw ¶a ¶ajaj .inajaj ku tat…ôŇčaaj a mi…ôdap tisuwan". ". " anu mańßida idaw ku sapińßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ, m…ôtar~…ĺaw a bar~…ĺaki.. mańßida sa minanam tatajtaj, masasudiku tu bar~…ĺaki"..pakajbar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °…ôn mudawijs tu sadikudaj a nikaudip, u kasa…ôtiman a tuki imańßini ." . sakapańß…ôn musikur~…ĺ ku udip nu udip , sumad…ôn t uku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° , u mańßiniaj sa misakapańß tu udip , u adiŇču isu kja masub…ôr~…ĺid a mududu ¶ pa ¶abaj tisuwan . .sisa, bar~…ĺaki tu kita , kańßina pa ¶…ôkir~…ĺ tu udip : pisinanuti a mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ : anu mańß…ôtik ku pusak : mur~…ĺuuŇč a misapud : tajda itatajan a mana pisai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč : anu suku ¶u amana r~…ĺuŇč :minanum sa , ju mukan maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ńßajmaw ńßan , munijur~…ĺ tu tat…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶an, munijur~…ĺ tu taŇčańß, patapabaw tu bata ¶ nu kuku ńßajmaw…ôn *. u ¶an ¶anan , sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßan muńßajmaw kaw udip t uku musauŇčajaj . **, . mańßida u kamu ni ma-kuj-s…ô " aniwjiw tu r~…ĺasubu" a sur~…ĺit sakamu sa "t…ôban nu r~…ĺabi mapa ¶…ôkir~…ĺ sa minanum , u dip tu mumur~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺaj a minanum ; anu i ¶uwa maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku adada sa , makakap…ôt tu sapaiju nu udip; napad…ôŇč satu t…ôr~…ĺaj madat…ôŇč ńß…ônaj ku kamu nu wawa ńßi ¶asa musakamu *.." kapańß tuwaj . . u d…ôd…ômiad mis…ôr~…ĺ…ôb kita tu d…ômiad , sadajum…ôn ńßank u nikaudip , satan…ôŇč…ôn ku kamu u bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° , amana piaŇči ¶ mana pi ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw , anu ¶aaj sakamu sa tawa ńßan . ." uaniwjiw, anu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč tu misur~…ĺit tu ¶ajaj kawkakasikadan a ¶uda , pinanami tu aniwjiw mir~…ĺikaj , sadim…ôr~…ĺ…ôn ku udip nu udip atu tańßinaaj a nisup…ôd a kar~…ĺisiw , u mańßiniaj kja u tat…ôŇčaaj nu babar~…ĺaki u sinidik…ô ¶an a "badańßuŇč"* "***, "**"*u makaar~…ĺaaj tu nu-paj-r~…ĺ a kawr~…ĺańß tabakiaj ,a sajdan "r~…ĺasubu nu aniwju"sakamu sa: "nikabar~…ĺakijan ¶aaj kawni kajdińßan , wijda sa sanu udip ńßan , sadikudaj tu nikaudip , mar~…ĺasar~…ĺiniŇč kisu nu udip ." ."kabar~…ĺakujan tu ...mar~…ĺa sar~…ĺiniŇč nu udip , udip ku musikur~…ĺaj tu udip , udip ku musakapańßaj tu udip tu . .nikabar~…ĺakijan tu ¶imańß…ôna ¶a ku majdińßaj . .u a ¶awa bar~…ĺaki tu anu ¶aaj sa mir~…ĺijas tu , ********.u wawa ńßananaj mińßi ¶a ¶aaj kajdińß tu babar~…ĺaki nu udip ,*********. nika sir~…ĺuma tu ku ńß…ôni ******.siwa…ôa***. u kawaw ku sakaudip nu ńß…ôni .tat…ôŇča maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° kuńß…ôni anu ńßamin ńßan ku kajdińß i tisuwan , midama tisuwan . .kju...amana pir~…ĺuŇču ¶ "sakajdińßan "**..****"**".minanam majdińß "tu udip".****"**"..misaŇča tu sar~…ĺiniŇč nu udip .misakapańß tu udip.*******. sikur~…ĺ…ôn ku udip*****.sakag…ônur~…ĺan musikur~…ĺ ku udip . .nikabar~…ĺaki tu ...u …ôk…ôŇč nu udip kan ¶a siin…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj , .anu pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa katar~…ĺaisiŇč.******.anu nu babar~…ĺaki ńßina adińßaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa .
